---
title: "Vortex of Accuracy"
---

<!-- # Vortex of Accuracy -->

As part of my passion for sports analytics, I made what I call the Vortex of Accuracy (VoA). I call it that because I think it's fun and silly, but believe me it is a serious statistical modeling effort. The VoA is a series of opponent-adjusted team strength models that I've created for [FBS College Football](https://github.com/gshelor/CFB_VoA), the [NFL](https://github.com/gshelor/NFL_VoA), and [Men's Division 1 College Basketball](https://github.com/gshelor/MCBB_VoA). These models take a combination of season summary stats and play-by-play data and attempt to approximate the projected win margin for each team against the hypothetical average team in their competition on a neutral field. The code for the football models is written in R and Stan. The code for the Men's College Basketball model is written in Python.
